description.value:
Your body is made of plant matter that evolved through exposure to psychic energy on Castrovel. You're quadrupedal, and your face features vine-like tentacles that you can use to defend yourself; you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Ancestral Unarmed Attack] (tentacle, 1d4 bludgeoning [agile, finesse, grapple, trip, unarmed], brawling weapon group) standardized ancestry feat. Ksariks generally recognize you as a member of their own species and avoid attacking you unless necessary for self-defense.

Ksarik leshies are always photosynthetic.
